title: Product dashboard overcorrection to zero-radius
sourceLocation: Review of AI-generated enterprise and product-application interfaces
summary: AI agents generating professional/business interfaces default to 0px border-radius on all elements, overcorrecting from the pill-radius default. This creates harsh, unapproachable interfaces.
supportingClaims: Zero-radius on every surface is as much a reflex default as pill-radius on everything.
Interactive elements benefit from slight rounding for visual approachability; sharp corners signal precision and are appropriate for data containers.
